problem.title: Binary Tree Paths
problem.description: Given the root of a binary tree, return all root-to-leaf paths in any order.
assumptions: A leaf is a node with no children.
Return all root-to-leaf paths in any order.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – DFS [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Perform a depth-first traversal, building a path string as we recurse down. When a leaf node is reached (no children), the accumulated path is complete and added to the result. The key insight is passing the current path as a string so each recursive branch is independent.
